name: Turnament
author: Poki
description: Turnament is a clever turn-based puzzle adventure where every move counts! Play as Rust Bucket and navigate through tricky levels filled with enemies, traps, coins, and smashable pots. Every step you take advances the world—enemies move, traps activate, and danger unfolds! Stay still, and nothing moves. Plan carefully, strategize your path, and complete each level in the fewest turns possible. Can you master the art of movement and outsmart every challenge? How to play Turnament? Use the arrow keys to move around Who created Turnament? Turnament was created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bad Ice-Cream , Double Edged and Bad Ice-Cream 3 ! How can I play Turnament for free? You can play Turnament for free on Poki.
